programmes.statusNote: The live official 2026-27 Programme page confirms Programme code A1M119 and a 24-credit-point award comprising all four 3-credit-point Core Courses and any four of seven 3-credit-point Elective Courses. Official EdUHK curriculum-module pages confirm all eleven course-code mappings. The SED6146 module title includes the word 'Environment', while the Programme page publishes the otherwise matching title without that word. The Programme page also states that the seven Elective Courses may not all be offered every year.

courseGroups.name: Core Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete all four Core Courses (12 credit points).

courses.name: Strategic Management and Planning for Edupreneurs
Whole Person Development and Well-being in Education
Creating the Future of China Education: A Policy and Reform Perspective

courseGroups.name: Elective Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Choose any four of the seven Elective Courses (12 credit points). The seven Elective Courses may not all be offered every year.

courses.name: Chinese Traditional Values and Sustainable Development Goals (SDG) in Education
Educational Leadership in Innovation Technology: Artificial Intelligence, Big Data and Knowledge Management
Building an Inclusive and Equitable Professional and Vocational Education in China
Application of Professional and Vocational Skills and Knowledge for Success
